relationship.description: A user can participate in many transactions with a specific role (sender or receiver)
A transaction involves multiple user roles (typically one sender and one receiver)
Each block references a single predecessor; a block can be predecessor to many subsequent blocks

metadata.improvements_made: Consolidated sender and receiver relationships into the associative entity USER_TRANSACTION_ROLE to make role semantics explicit and avoid duplicate foreign keys. Added explicit primary key attributes and foreign key references. Refined block chaining relationship to 1:N to reflect that one block can be the predecessor of many later blocks. Retained core entities and attributes, preserving simplicity and performance while enhancing clarity and future extensibility.
